Program_Description: The San Diego County Black Infant Health Program (BIH) works to improve African-American infant and maternal health, as well as decrease Black-White health and social inequities for women and infants.

Application_Process: If you are eligible and would like to learn more about enrolling in BIH, please fill out the form of your area or call BIH at 619-266-7466.

Program_Description: Enhanced Care Management (ECM) is available for select Medi-Cal members with complex needs.
Target_Population: Medi-Cal members with complex needs.
Eligibility_Requirements: Confirm the individual has active Medi-Cal and identify their Managed Care Plan (MCP).
Application_Process: Complete the universal or plan specific ECM referral form and email it to the assigned MCP’s designated email address.

Program_Description: Community Supports are medically appropriate and cost-effective services provided by MCPs to help members address their health-related social needs.
Target_Population: Medi-Cal members, including those with complex needs.
Eligibility_Requirements: Confirm the individual has active Medi-Cal and identify their Managed Care Plan (MCP).
Application_Process: Complete the plan specific Community Supports referral form for each service needed and email the form(s) to the assigned MCP’s designated email address.
